Interface IMessageRetentionProvider

public interface IMessageRetentionProvider
Provider interface for GTNet message retention configuration. Application modules implement this interface to register their message code groups and default retention periods. The scheduled aggregation task discovers all registered providers via Spring dependency injection and deletes old messages accordingly.

Example implementation

@Bean
public IMessageRetentionProvider lastPriceRetention() {
    return new IMessageRetentionProvider() {
        public String getConfigKey() { return "LP"; }
        public List<Byte> getMessageCodes() { return List.of((byte) 60, (byte) 61); }
        public int getDefaultRetentionDays() { return 1; }
    };
}

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getConfigKey()
    Returns the configuration key used in the PropertyString format.
    int
    getDefaultRetentionDays()
    Returns the default retention period in days, used when the config key is not found in the global parameter.
    List<Byte>
    getMessageCodes()
    Returns the list of GTNet message code byte values that should be deleted when retention period expires.

  • Method Details

    • getConfigKey

      String getConfigKey()
      Returns the configuration key used in the PropertyString format. This key is used to look up retention days from the global parameter gt.gtnet.del.message.recv (e.g., "LP=1,HP=5,SL=5").
      Returns:
      the config key (e.g., "LP", "HP", "SL")

    • getMessageCodes

      List<Byte> getMessageCodes()
      Returns the list of GTNet message code byte values that should be deleted when retention period expires.
      Returns:
      list of message code bytes

    • getDefaultRetentionDays

      int getDefaultRetentionDays()
      Returns the default retention period in days, used when the config key is not found in the global parameter.
      Returns:
      default retention days
